name: Mainichi Comnet Co., Ltd.
summary: Mainichi Comnet Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the real estate business in Japan. The company is involved in planning, design supervision, consulting, and development of real estate properties; development and management of student apartments and dormitories; purchase of land and buildings; rental of housing and commercial facilities; and advertising agency business. It also engages in the development of sports facilities; and cohabitation, training, and travel planning, as well as conference, international exchange, and auto-car workshop activities. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
